description: A designed 'GANG ARREST' card with a grunge/graffiti aesthetic (square). The words 'GANG' and 'ARREST' are splashed diagonally across the image in large, distressed, cream-colored stencil/spray-paint lettering. The background is a darkened, pixelated/blurred candid surveillance-style photo of several men sitting outdoors on what appears to be a park bench. The upper-right header reads 'PCC' in large white serif caps with 'Primeiro Comando da Capital' beneath it (referencing the Brazilian prison gang). A semi-transparent red panel at lower left carries the subject's name in white sans-serif, 'Pedro Oscar De Souza-Almeida,' with a bulleted charge: 'Weapons sales and possession.' The lower right shows the circular DHS seal and 'ICE' wordmark in white serif. The gritty graffiti styling and gang branding dramatize the arrest for a general-public audience, tying transnational gangs to the enforcement mission.
notable_text: GANG ARREST; PCC - Primeiro Comando da Capital; Pedro Oscar De Souza-Almeida; Weapons sales and possession; ICE
